---
title: "Onyxia for Geospatial — A Satellite Imagery Use Case"
subtitle: |
  [**Raya Berova**]{.orange}
date: "06/25/2026"
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
slide-number: true
lang: en-GB
slide-tone: false
chalkboard:
  theme: whiteboard
format:
  onyxia-revealjs:
    output-file: index.html
controls: true
css: ../custom.css
ascii: true
---

# Outline

1️⃣ Introduction

2️⃣ Onyxia

3️⃣ Live Demo

4️⃣ GeoServer

5️⃣ Web Application

# 1️⃣ Introduction

{{< include sections/1-introduction.qmd >}}

# Outline

1️⃣ Introduction

**2️⃣ Onyxia**

3️⃣ Live Demo

4️⃣ GeoServer

5️⃣ Web Application

# 2️⃣ Onyxia

{{< include sections/2-onyxia.qmd >}}

# Outline

1️⃣ Introduction

2️⃣ Onyxia

**3️⃣ Live Demo**

4️⃣ GeoServer

5️⃣ Web Application

# 3️⃣ Live Demo

{{< include sections/3-demo.qmd >}}

# Outline

1️⃣ Introduction

2️⃣ Onyxia

3️⃣ Live Demo

**4️⃣ GeoServer**

5️⃣ Web Application

# 4️⃣ GeoServer

{{< include sections/4-geoserver.qmd >}}

# Outline

1️⃣ Introduction

2️⃣ Onyxia

3️⃣ Live Demo

4️⃣ GeoServer

**5️⃣ Web Application**

# 5️⃣ Web Application

{{< include sections/5-webapp.qmd >}}

## Thank you!

**Any questions?**

::: {.notes}
Be ready to discuss:
- How to get access to SSPCloud / Onyxia
- Kubernetes admin role requirements for GeoServer
- MLFlow model registry workflow in detail
- ArgoCD replica scaling for large inference jobs
- Observable Framework vs other frontend options
:::
